dialogues.text: I need thirty. Can't get into it right now.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll pay it back. You know I'm good for it.

dialogues.text: Truck needs work. I keep putting it off. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll get it sorted this week. Been meaning to.

dialogues.text: I've been thinking about calling you more. Haven't done it. Can you spare thirty?
dialogues.yes_response: I'm going to call more. I mean that. Starting this week.

dialogues.text: Your sister's been asking about you. She worries. Don't tell her I told you. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: She'd want to know you're okay. She just doesn't know how to say it.
dialogues.no_response: She'll worry anyway. That's what she does.

dialogues.text: I want to take your mother somewhere nice. Haven't done it in years. Thirty would help.
dialogues.yes_response: She'd like that. She doesn't ask for much. Never has.
dialogues.no_response: Maybe another time. It can wait.

dialogues.text: I'm not good at saying things. I never have been. You know that. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm going to do better. I mean it. I should've been better.

dialogues.text: I got a call from the hospital. About billing. I covered it. I need thirty back.
dialogues.yes_response: Don't worry about that. You focus on getting through the day.
dialogues.no_response: I'll sort it. Don't worry about it.

dialogues.text: I'm not good at this. Any of it. I want you to know I tried. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: You didn't get that from me. Being good at things. That's all you.

dialogues.text: I should've come to more of your things. I know that. I know. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll make it up to you. I don't know how yet. But I will.

dialogues.text: I know I haven't been — I don't know how to finish that. Thirty.
dialogues.yes_response: You're a good kid. You always have been. I should've said that more.
